sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT toRelativeSecondNum(event_date) AS seconds_since_epoch FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toDateTime('2022-12-31 23:59:59') WHERE event_date = toDateTime('2022-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT toRelativeSecondNum(toDateTime(CONCAT('2023-', CAST(month(now()) AS String), '-01 00:00:00'))) AS current_month_start;
